name: Soria
long_description: Soria is an AI-native Bloomberg Terminal built from the bottom up, one sector at a time. Starting with health insurance and hospitals, we aggregate dozens of long-tail public and private data sets into a continuously updated "sector model" that replaces what every analyst currently maintains independently in Excel. Customers get auditable, Excel-like dashboards, which are activated by platform features including search, AI chat, alerts, an excel add-on and MCP. We are already working with many of the largest banks and hedge funds, and now we're expanding to all of healthcare before moving to other major verticals.
one_liner: AI Bloomberg Terminal built for Healthcare (and beyond)
